title: Rollback behavior
go_no_go_summary: Claude reported GO for S17 with no P0/P1 findings. Two P2 operational closeout findings are resolved by evidence creation and executable validation gates. Two P3 notes are informational and require no code change.

findings.title: Closeout evidence not in diff
findings.summary: Claude noted that S17 closeout files were not yet present and that production_ready parity requires packet, command evidence, Claude review result, adjudication, and construction inspection.
findings.resolution: Added the S17 closeout evidence set under docs/goal-closeout/rp00-p02-m03-s17 and set the construction inspection verification flag.

findings.title: Executable gates not run in read-only review
findings.summary: Claude did not run Bash by design and requested in-repo test and validation gates before closeout.
findings.resolution: Ran parser checks, node tests, npm test, product contract validation, requirements validation, weighted ledger validation, full plan validation, goal closeout validation, git diff whitespace check, and RP00 control-plane validation.

findings.title: Validator reuse coupling for S18
findings.summary: Claude noted that S17 revalidates S16 shape by overriding working_product_behavior_ref and next_subphase and that future S18 copies must keep override lists in sync.
findings.resolution: No S17 action. This is a forward-looking warning for the next subphase.

findings.title: Incident traceability satisfied by strategy metadata
findings.summary: Claude noted that incidentTraceabilityRequired is satisfied by strategy definition while incident trace and observability writes remain forbidden.
findings.resolution: No code change. This is intentional for S17 and is documented by the strategy reason and no-write flags.

claude_cli.command: claude -p --model claude-opus-4-8 --effort max --permission-mode dontAsk --tools Read,Grep,Glob --disallowedTools Bash,Edit,Write,MultiEdit,NotebookEdit --output-format json

findings.title: Closeout evidence not in diff
findings.summary: S17 evidence files are required before production_ready.

findings.title: Executable gates not run
findings.summary: Read-only Claude review did not run Bash; local gates were executed separately.

findings.title: Validator reuse coupling for S18
findings.summary: Future S18 copied nesting patterns must keep override lists synchronized.

findings.title: Incident traceability satisfied by strategy metadata
findings.summary: S17 intentionally records incident traceability as metadata while forbidding incident trace and observability writes.

required_followups: Continue with RP00.P02.M03.S18 Retry behavior as the next subphase.
review_notes: Claude confirmed the S17 metadata-only rollback behavior boundary, S16 dependency, recovery strategy refs, incident traceability metadata, no-write flags, validators, fixture parity, and S18 successor behavior.
There were no P0 or P1 findings.
parsed_review.summary: Claude reported GO with no blocking findings. S17 is ready for closeout after evidence and final gate validation.

raw_claude_cli_result_summary.summary: Claude returned GO with no P0/P1 findings; P2 closeout items are resolved by evidence and executable gates.
